purpose: Machine-enforced regression for live SENTRY pass-3 defects — no silent re-pass.

layers.local_mock: Mock pool behavioral probes (no DATABASE_URL, no Railway)
layers.local_neon_optional: Optional Neon when DATABASE_URL set — cleanup fingerprint only
layers.live_railway: HTTP probes against PUBLIC_BASE_URL deliberation API

probes.description: Gate pass without cncl_roster must fail with ROSTER_MISSING
probes.setup: Hist case + CFO receipt only; no roster POST

probes.description: load_bearing=true on gate pass persists metadata_json.load_bearing
probes.setup: Full roster + hist + cfo + consensus; load_bearing pass
probes.action: passDeliberationGate with load_bearing true after consensus

probes.description: Failed load-bearing gate cannot downgrade to non-load-bearing pass
probes.setup: Roster+hist+cfo; fail load_bearing pass (no consensus); retry pass without load_bearing
probes.action: passDeliberationGate load_bearing true then passDeliberationGate default

probes.description: Negative CFO tokens or cost_usd rejected at validator
probes.setup: POST cfo-receipt with tokens:-1 or cost_usd:-1

probes.description: Roster expand cannot wipe audit_expanded_roster when omitted/null
probes.setup: Initial roster + expand with audit_expanded_roster; second expand without field
probes.local_mock_note: Optional service-level unit if route logic extracted

probes.description: Negative scorecard cost_usd, token_count, latency_ms rejected
Cleanup script targets same Neon store Railway reads

harness_deliverables_required_by_bp: npm run lifeos:deliberation:regression exits 0 when all probes pass
forbidden: Modify production deliberation business logic in this mission (harness only)
Skip probes silently on missing env (fail-closed with SKIP receipt reason)
